title: Bringing the art of movies back to local communities
summary:
INDY Cinema Group is a global cinema operating platform, helping modern cinemas unlock their full potential with new tech. From branded digital experiences and in-seat QR code ordering to intuitive point of sale, in-theater server handhelds, membership programs, and real-time analytics, INDY brings everything together in one platform.

Learn more about INDY Cinema Group: https://stripe.com/customers/indy-cinema-group
